jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer (Vue 3 / TypeScript) - N-iX
jobs.rawDescription: We are a leading European AI company developing large language models and generative platforms for enterprise and government clients. Our products combine high-performance technologies, transparency, accessibility, and data security, fully aligned with European regulatory and ethical standards. As a Senior Frontend Engineer, you will take ownership of building scalable, accessible, and high-quality user interfaces, including chat-based AI experiences. You will work closely with product, design, and backend teams to deliver inclusive, reliable, and maintainable frontend systems. Responsibilities * Design, build, and maintain frontend applications using Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, and Vite * Own and promote Accessibility (A11y) standards, ensuring inclusive user experiences * Develop and maintain chat-based user interfaces integrated with backend APIs * Write and maintain End-to-End tests using Playwright * Work within a Nx monorepo and contribute to frontend architecture decisions * Ensure high code quality through reviews, testing, and best practices * Optimize performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability * Collaborate closely with designers, backend engineers, and product managers Requirements * 4+ years of professional frontend development experience (most of which should have been in a production setup with real customers) * Strong expertise in Vue.js (Vue 3) and TypeScript * Proven experience implementing accessibility (A11y) standards * Experience with state management (Pinia or similar) * Solid experience with E2E testing (Playwright or equivalent) * Strong CSS skills and experience with responsive design * Experience working in monorepo environments (Nx or similar) * Ability to take ownership and contribute at an architectural level Nice to have * Experience building chat, messaging, or real-time interfaces * Familiarity with WebSockets, SSE, or real-time data flows * Experience with AI-powered user interfaces * Experience with design systems or comp

score.reason: Excellent match on core stack: Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, and Vite are all expert/strong skills. Senior-level role perfectly aligned with 10+ years frontend experience and architectural ownership. Remote Spain location is ideal for CET timezone.

This staff level engineering role is focused on a critical product challenge: allowing both technical or less-technically proficient users of n8n to turn AI powered automated workflows into something they can rely on every day. That means building systems that consistently generate the right output, stay grounded in the user’s workflow, and improve quickly through iteration and evaluation. You’ll work on the orchestration layer between users, workflows, a

jobs.title: Front End Developer (Vue.js) - fully remote within Europe (m/f/d)
jobs.rawDescription: The Team We’re a fully remote, globally distributed team driven by curiosity, humility, and a relentless commitment to growth. At our core, we believe that collaboration fuels innovation, and we’ve built a positive, inclusive culture where diverse perspectives are not only welcomed, but celebrated. You’ll be embraced by a tight-knit tech team that supports, challenges, and uplifts one another. From day one, you’ll feel part of something bigger. Your Role We're on the hunt for a Front-End Developer who’s passionate about crafting elegant, high-performance web applications that look as good as they feel. In this role, you'll take the lead in building fast, accessible, and SEO-optimized user experiences using Vue 3 and Nuxt 3. This is more than just code, your work will shape how users engage with our platform across the globe. You'll collaborate within a cross-functional team that thrives on agile processes, shared goals, and creative problem-solving. What You'll Be Doing • Build, enhance, and maintain modern front-end applications with Vue 3 and Nuxt 3 • Craft lightning-fast, accessible, and mobile-friendly UIs that exceed Core Web Vitals benchmarks • Leverage Server-Side Rendering (SSR) to maximize SEO and load speed • Integrate with REST APIs to create fluid and efficient data flows • Apply modern development practices, clean code, reusable components, testing, and robust documentation • Stay ahead of front-end trends and share insights with the team • Ensure consistency across browsers and devices with responsive design principles • Contribute to architectural decisions, peer reviews, and team-wide discussions What You'll Need • 5+ years of experience in modern front-end development • Mastery of HTML5 , CSS , and JavaScript (ES6+) • Deep knowledge of Vue.js (ideally Vue 3) and Nuxt.js • Strong understanding of SSR , performance tuning, and Core Web Vitals • Experience with TypeScript and scalable CSS architecture • A sharp eye for clean, user-friendly UI/UX design

score.reason: Strong Vue 3 and TypeScript fundamentals, but role demands deep Nuxt.js and SSR expertise as core responsibilities. CLAUDE.md explicitly flags deep Nuxt roles as off-target despite Vue/Nuxt connection.
